name: Gusto
tagline: AI-powered payroll and benefits platform for small businesses
description: Gusto is an intuitive payroll and HR platform designed for small businesses. Its AI capabilities automate payroll processing, tax calculations, compliance updates, and benefits administration. Gusto's intelligent system handles multi-state payroll, automatic tax filing, workers' comp, and provides employees with self-service access to pay stubs, tax forms, and benefits enrollment.
cons: Phone support limited on basic plans
